inputs.fcf_source: Three-year average OCF $1098.909M ÷ 118.607M shares; FY2025 OCF $1282.267M and capex $589.801M per ALB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260211_rpt20251231_acc0000915913_26_000018.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 GAAP net loss $511M reflects lithium trough pricing and depreciation; Lawrence base uses three-year average operating cash flow per share, not 2022 peak earnings.

bear.notes: Prolonged lithium oversupply; conversion delays; debt service pressure

base.notes: Mid-cycle lithium normalization; modest deleveraging from OCF; exit 9× owner cash

bull.notes: EV demand recovery and contract pricing lift; faster conversion ramp

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Conversion assets and resource rights carried at depreciated cost; lithium reserves not separately marked to spot

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Greenfield and brownfield conversion capacity; modeled in conversion_capacity_and_contract_option

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Energy Storage segment loss in trough; consolidated operating loss FY2025 $367M

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Long-term offtake and conversion contracts; separate option component

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No special dividend or litigation recovery catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Revenue scales with lithium carbonate/hydroxide pricing and conversion volumes; bromine and specialty catalysts provide counter-cyclical cash; capital spending ramps conversion capacity tied to EV battery demand.
growth_explanation.source: ALB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260211_rpt20251231_acc0000915913_26_000018.htm net sales $5142.733M and operating cash flow trend

falsifiers.trigger: Spot lithium price stays below cash-cost curve for four consecutive quarters without volume offset
Capital spending exceeds $800M for two consecutive years while OCF falls below $800M

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map mid-cycle lithium and specialty operations, conversion capacity option, net financial claims, and cycle/capex reserve once each.

components.label: Mid-cycle lithium, bromine, and specialty chemicals operations

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ALB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260211_rpt20251231_acc0000915913_26_000018.htm: FY2025 net sales $5142.733M, OCF $1282.267M, Q1 2026 cash $1089.809M, total debt $1881.831M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
